posts.title: Election Fraud

twitter.content:
Proven SCAM in black and white. 

In 2024,  the District of Columbia had 674K registered voters, but only 502K citizens of voting age. 

THIS is why Democrats are against the SAVE America Act. 

This is happening in about 35 states.
